reasoning: The control AC-6(6) focuses on ensuring least privilege and restricting privileged access, particularly for non-organizational users. In Kubernetes, this maps directly to RBAC configurations where roles and bindings should enforce least privilege. The functions generated ensure that no cluster-wide administrative roles are unnecessarily bound, and that service accounts have restricted access, aligning with the least privilege principle.
title: Least Privilege - Least privilege | privileged access by non - organizational users prohibit privi
